s08.caption: 2: The Long Island Sound roars against the rocks.
s08.title: Shot 2

s08.caption: 3: Dallas and Howie head toward the marsh.
s08.title: Shot 3

s08.caption: 5: Howie senses something in the marsh.
s08.title: Shot 5

s08.caption: 6: Coyotes bark in the distance as the wind rises.
s08.title: Shot 6

s08.caption: 8: The HUM vibrates through Dallas's chest.
s08.title: Shot 8

s08.caption: 11: Dallas leaves Howie behind at the creek's edge.
s08.title: Shot 11

s08.caption: 12: Dallas discovers a rigged trailcam in the reeds.
s08.title: Shot 12

s08.caption: 13: The trace settles into an otherworldly pattern.
s08.title: Shot 13

s23.caption: A-1: Dallas and Asher enter the tall grass carrying the heavy equipment.
s23.title: Shot 1

s23.caption: A-2: The nylon straps bite into Dallas' shoulders, straining the fabric.
s23.title: Shot 2

s23.caption: A-3: Dallas drops the speaker into the mud in pain. He looks at his hand—black veins pulse under his skin, beginning to look translucent.
s23.title: Shot 3

s23.caption: B-1: Dominic runs towards Dallas and Asher, screaming for Makayla.
s23.title: Shot 4

s23.caption: B-2: Dominic paces and takes a hit from his inhaler.
s23.title: Shot 5

s23.caption: B-3: Dallas grips his arm tightly and stoically marches onward. Dominic takes another hit.
s23.title: Shot 6

s23.caption: C-1: Crossing the threshold into pitch black. The tall grass towers over ten feet high, whipping violently in unpredictable rhythms.
s23.title: Shot 7

s23.caption: C-2: Makayla sweeps the handheld speaker like a flashlight, the small blinking green LED on her chest rig leading the way.
s23.title: Shot 8

s23.caption: C-3: Asher follows, hunched low with the backpack containing the golden creature. Dallas and Dominic take up the rear, sinking deep into the marsh mud.
s23.title: Shot 9

s23.caption: D-1: Massive, formless shadows drift lazily through the storm clouds. Hundreds of glowing red eyes pierce the dark.
s23.title: Shot 10
